title: TQ's No Duping
description: Various toggles for disabling dupes (rails; carpets; tnt; gravity blocks; tripwire hooks).
body:
This data pack aims to disable the following duplication glitches: rails; carpets; string; tnt; gravity blocks; tripwire hooks. It does this by deleting the duplicated item or entity after it has been created in the general set-ups. **Notes:** dupes are enabled by default, so disable them in the settings.
Hide the “world warning” when enabling this datapack Rename the following files **inside the datapack `.zip`** from **`.json`** to **`.txt`**: - `data\minecraft\tags\dialog\pause_screen_additions.json` → `.txt` - `data\no_dupe\dialog\settings.json` → `.txt` - `no_dupe_overlay_88\data\no_dupe\dialog\settings.json` → `.txt`
## Setup / settings (1.21.6+) for server owners or single players The configuration is now handled through an in-game dialog menu. You can open it in either of these ways: * `/trigger tq_no_dupe_tutorial` * From the **pause menu** (in-game) The current settings can still be viewed with: * `/trigger tq_no_dupe_tell_settings`
Older versions (previous setup via commands) There are various commands to configure this data pack for your world or server, shown with `/trigger tq_no_dupe_tutorial` or below here: * command to enable a dupe: `/function no_dupe:enable_dupe {dupe:''}` * command to disable a dupe: `/function no_dupe:disable_dupe {dupe:''}` * command to view the current dupe settings: `/trigger tq_no_dupe_tell_settings` * `` is one of: `rails`; `carpets`; `tnt`; `gravity_blocks`; `tripwire_hooks` (and `string` before 1.21.2). * `/function`-commands are admin commands and thus require OP. The settings of the data pack are viewable with `/trigger tq_no_dupe_tell_settings`.
